author: data.always
content:
Now that client tagging in graffiti is normalized, I will point out that Binance (the 2nd largest tagged proposer set on Dune, at ~8% of staking market share--probably even larger with better tagging) runs 99% Lighthouse. Not sure if anyone has contacts there, but if someone convinced them to swap CL clients it would drop LH dominance from ~52% to ~44% and the Network would be much healthier. 

https://dune.com/queries/7971900/11955783
